{'minifiedCode': '\ndef l(n: str) -> str:\n  r = ""\n  while n:\n    o = int(n[0], 16)\n    if o < 8:\n      r += ["0"*16,"f"*16,"0"*8,"f"*8,"0000","ffff","00","ff"][o]\n      n = n[1:]\n    else:\n      b = o - 7\n      r += n[1:b + 1]\n      n = n[b + 1:]\n\n  return r\nd = int(l(""),16)\ndef f(x,y):\n  i = int(x * 128) + int(y * 128) * 128\n  return (d >> i) & 1\n'}
